mapper.select: select cos.id, cos.create_time, cos.order_no, cos.user_id, cos.merchant_id, cos.real_price, cos.settlement_amount, cos.state, cos.payment_type, cos.payment_state, cos.remarks, col.logistics_no, su.username as username, cmi.merchant_name from cm_order_shopping cos left join cm_customer su on cos.user_id = su.user_id left join cm_order_logistics col on cos.order_no = col.shopping_order_no left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cos.merchant_id = cmi.id where cos.id = #{id}
select id, create_time, order_id, sku_id, amount, product_name, deleted from cm_order_products where order_id = #{id}
mapper.update:
update cm_order_shopping set deleted = '1' where id in
#{id}
